edges.detail: No fence or dependency preserves the W->W program-order edge.
External communication edge is always part of global order.
No fence or dependency preserves the R->R program-order edge.
External communication edge is always part of global order.

reason: Cycle is broken: program-order edge(s) p0_wx->p0_wy, p1_ry->p1_rx are not preserved by RVWMO PPO. (RVV reduces vector memory ordering to per-element RVWMO, and a FENCE orders those element accesses exactly like scalar, so this verdict equals the scalar MP twin; herd7's RISC-V front-end does not parse vector ops, so it is native-only.) (herd7 not on PATH; no cross-check performed.)
